blended.narrative: Bluewood is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 2,771 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 45.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 17" over the past week. Current depth: 51".
